zoodles-with-plant-based-meatballs.name: Zoodles With Plant-based Meatballs
instructions: Heat a large (12-inch) nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add 1 tablespoon olive oil, then the meatballs. Cook, turning frequently, until even golden brown and heated through the center, 8 to 10 minutes total. Remove from skillet to a paper towel-lined plate. Once skillet is cool enough to handle, wipe clean with paper towel.
Return skillet to medium heat. Add 1 teaspoon olive oil, tomatoes, and 1/2 teaspoon salt. Cook for 2 to 3 minutes, until slightly golden and just tender (but not burst). Remove to a plate.

Add the remaining 1 teaspoon olive oil, then zucchini noodles. Season with remaining 1/2 teaspoon salt and stir very gently to combine. Cook, stirring occasionally, for about 3 minutes or until zoodles are slightly tender. Add the pesto and stir gently to combine.
Transfer to a large serving platter and top with meatballs, tomatoes, roasted almonds, and Parmesan cheese, if desired. Serve immediately.

zucchini-meatballs-vegetarian-and-comede.name: Zucchini Meatballs: Vegetarian And
zucchini-meatballs-vegetarian-and-comede.original_name: Albóndigas caseras de calabacín: vegetarianas y fáciles

ingredients.item: 5  cucharadas de pan rallado o harina de avena
Salt, black pepper and a pint of oregano (to taste)
Aceite de oliva virgen extra (al gusto)

instructions: He scattering pumpkins with a thick pumpkins. Put them in a paddle and add a pint of salt and leave them to stand for 15 minutes. After this time, put the pumpkin onto a clean and tight kitchen cloth. You'll be surprised how much water goes out. That's the secret of firmness.

In a bowl, mix well dry pumpkin with egg, parmesan cheese, garlic and spices. Add the frosted bread or oatmeal little by little. The mass should be moist but molded. If a ball forms up to your hands, add an extra tablespoon of frosted bread.
Fold balls with a nut size and clamp them slightly so they have a thick disc shape. That makes it easier for the heat to get to the centre quickly without burning the outside.
Warm up the oil with medium heat and cook the meatballs from both sides till they are golden and firm. Don't move them too much at first. They need to be sealed.
